description: A horizontal row of large-number metrics with labels. Use for quantified credentials or social proof (e.g. '+30 years experience', '100+ clients').

id.description: Optional HTML id attribute for anchor linking (e.g. navigation anchors).

title.description: Optional section heading above the stats row.

variant.description: Background presentation. 'default' = page background. 'dark' = surface background with borders. 'inverted' = inverted background for strong contrast.

items.description: Array of stat items. Each: { number: string, label: string }.

label.description: The metric label, e.g. 'Years of experience'.
